title: Cold Open Still
caption: The series begins with a mood before it becomes an argument.

title: Not Individual Dysfunction
caption: The subject is not personal failure. It is the systems that make dysfunction feel personal.

title: Script as Instrument
caption: The essay is built through voice, pacing, image, and diagnostic rhythm.

title: Cultural Weather Map
caption: Each script traces a feeling through media, technology, labor, social expectation, and the body.

title: Episode Structure
caption: The current evidence is the scripted sequence; production timelines remain proposed until an episode enters the edit.

title: Research / Image / Voice
caption: The planned form cuts between sourced evidence, visual observation, and a personal voice rather than delivering a single diagnosis.

title: Public Bridge
caption: The series is the accessible bridge between dense systems thought and emotional legibility.

title: The Feeling Remains
caption: Understanding the conditions around a feeling does not make the feeling disappear.
